customCSS: .meadow-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;overflow:hidden}.meadow-pattern{position:absolute;top:-120px;left:-120px;right:-120px;bottom:-120px;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='120' height='120' viewBox='0 0 120 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='%23806040' fill-opacity='0.055'%3E%3Cellipse cx='20' cy='18' rx='3' ry='5' transform='rotate(-20 20 18)'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='55' cy='10' r='1.2'/%3E%3Cellipse cx='90' cy='25' rx='2.5' ry='4.5' transform='rotate(15 90 25)'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='10' cy='50' r='1'/%3E%3Cellipse cx='45' cy='55' rx='2' ry='4' transform='rotate(-35 45 55)'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='78' cy='60' r='1.3'/%3E%3Cellipse cx='108' cy='48' rx='3' ry='5' transform='rotate(25 108 48)'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='30' cy='85' r='1.1'/%3E%3Cellipse cx='65' cy='90' rx='2.5' ry='4' transform='rotate(-10 65 90)'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='100' cy='95' r='1'/%3E%3Cellipse cx='15' cy='110' rx='2' ry='3.5' transform='rotate(30 15 110)'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='50' cy='105' r='0.9'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='85' cy='75' r='1.2'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='35' cy='35' r='0.8'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");background-size:120px 120px;animation:meadow-drift 60s linear infinite}.meadow-speckle{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(128,96,64,0.035) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:20px 20px}@keyframes meadow-drift{0%{transform:translate(0,0)}100%{transform:translate(-120px,-120px)}}
